rows.label: qev015601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oho! This is quite a fine stall!
This is exactly the ideal location I have been seeking![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0002
rows.name:
Excuse me, are you the proprietor of this shop?
I have something I would like to discuss with you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0003
rows.name:
What is it? If it's about the shop...
I'm sorry, but could you come back another time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0004
rows.name:
There isn't a single thing left to sell.
This shop is empty.
Just like... me right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for the reason there is no merchandise.

rows.label: qev015601_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev015601_SEL0021
rows.name: Show concern for the depressed woman.

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0005
rows.name:
...My husband was a Pathfinder.
Whenever he went around Mira on missions,
he would pick up all sorts of things for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0006
rows.name:
I used to sell those things in this shop, but...
My husband was killed by aliens a little while ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0007
rows.name: Now, all the shop's merchandise is completely gone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Thank you...
Are you a BLADE too, by any chance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0009
rows.name:
My husband was a BLADE too, you know.
During his last mission, he was killed by aliens...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Because of that, the merchandise my husband gathered
from all over Mira is gone, too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0011
rows.name: *Sigh*... What am I supposed to do from now on...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0012
rows.name:
If I can't run the shop, I need to find some other job
and be of use to BLADE...
I know that in my head, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0013
rows.name:
I just have no strength in my body...
I can't bring myself to move from this spot...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0014
rows.name:
Then this is perfect!
It is truly a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0015
rows.name:
You see, for some time now, I have been collecting and inventing
exceptional items that could even be called works of art.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0016
rows.name:
I have been hoping to offer them to the Earthlings
at a very reasonable price.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0017
rows.name:
This shop is exactly the appropriate place
to display my precious gems![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0018
rows.name:
This is my lifelong request!
Please, lend me this location![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Who is this guy? Why should I let an alien use
this shop filled with memories of my husband...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0020
rows.name:
No, no, leaving a shop filled with such brilliant memories
completely empty and deserted...
Isn't that even sadder?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0021
rows.name:
I am sure he would have wanted it to be
put to good use, would he not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0022
rows.name: ...That... might be true, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0023
rows.name:
There is also a secret device I am jointly developing
with the Ma-non people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0024
rows.name:
I will absolutely prove to be of use to the Earthlings!
Please... trust me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_JNK0030
rows.name: Support

rows.label: qev015601_SEL0031
rows.name: Back up Lu's negotiation.

rows.label: qev015601_JNK0040
rows.name: Stop

rows.label: qev015601_SEL0041
rows.name: Stop Lu's blunt negotiation.

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0025
rows.name:
He's a weird guy, but... It doesn't seem like he's asking
to borrow it with half-hearted intentions...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Did I say something strange?
If I was rude, I apologize.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0027
rows.name:
However, my desire to be of use to you Earthlings
is the undeniable truth!
Could I ask you to consider it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0029
rows.name:
...If you're going to go that far, I have one condition.
In place of my husband, who was a Pathfinder...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0030
rows.name:
Could you expand the Frontier Net in the Valley of Oblivion
to over 30%?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0031
rows.name:
He was more dedicated to his work than anyone...
I'm sure leaving a mission unfinished is his biggest regret.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0032
rows.name:
We registered our marriage when things were chaotic
during the Earth incident, so we never had a proper ceremony.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0033
rows.name:
He told me that once his mission progressed that far,
we would hold a wedding ceremony anew...
That had become a sort of milestone for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0034
rows.name:
Our promise can never come true anymore, but...
Please let me know when you've accomplished the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0035
rows.name:
Perhaps it will be the catalyst I need
to start moving forward...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0036
rows.name:
...I'm counting on you. In place of my husband,
please expand the Frontier Net in the Valley of Oblivion
to over 30%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0037
rows.name:
I heard from the Pathfinders.
It seems you finally finished the job...
my husband left behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0038
rows.name:
He shouldn't have any regrets with this.
As promised, you are free to use this shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0039
rows.name:
Yes! I will absolutely not let you regret
entrusting this to me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0040
rows.name:
Please watch over us with the feeling
of riding in a mud boat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0041
rows.name:
Haha... You mean a large ship, right?
Somehow, watching a weirdo like you[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0042
rows.name:
makes feeling depressed seem ridiculous.
I can't have a wedding with my husband anymore, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0043
rows.name:
I've gained enough energy to hold a proper funeral
and find some closure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0044
rows.name:
I suppose... thank you.
Well then, do whatever you like with this place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0045
rows.name:
So how is it, Giogion?
Does it seem that device will be completed?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0046
rows.name:
Heheh, Artist Lu has designed
something unbelievable, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0047
rows.name:
Tinkering with mechs hasn't given me this much emotion
since I was a kid, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0048
rows.name:
All we need now is Slimy Epithelium,
Ittetsu Iron,
and Zedis Twigs[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0049
rows.name: Once we have those, it will be fini-i-ish![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0050
rows.name:
Hey, what do you say? If you're in a hurry,
you should dash and get them, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0051
rows.name: Ne! Artist Lu's friend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0052
rows.name:
With those, I'll properly shape
Lu's super machine, ne![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev015601_SEL0051
rows.name: Reply with an OK without hesitation.

rows.label: qev015601_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015601_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask what on earth they are making.

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0053
rows.name:
As expected of Lu's friend!
Just the right feeling![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0054
rows.name:
That's a sur-prise for when it's finished!
Anyway, hurry up and bring them to me, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0055
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, yo~!
Let's all totally make the awesome machine
Lu thought up, yeeeah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0056
rows.name:
Oh, you're the one from before...
How are things? Is the shop doing well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0057
rows.name:
On my end, I held a simple funeral
for my husband.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0058
rows.name:
I think I can finally find some closure with this...
I'll try looking for a new job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015601_MSG0059
rows.name:
So that someday... when he returns from the Central Life,
I can proudly face him.[ST:wait ]
